settings.intro: Straight answers, no run-around. If it’s not covered here, write to us — a human reads everything.

settings.heading: Delivery
settings.body:
UK: £3.95 tracked, free over £40. Orders dispatch within 48 hours and typically land in 2–4 working days. We’ve moved parcels through worse.

International: Yes. Tracked worldwide shipping calculated at checkout; duties shown upfront, no doorstep surprises. Mind the Channel.

settings.heading: Returns
settings.body:
30 days, no quibble. Quibbling would be nonsense. Unworn, unwashed, tags on — send it back and we’ll refund or exchange, your call.

Wrong size? Exchanges ship free. Faulty print or seam? We replace it, no fuss — and we’ll want a word with the printer.

settings.heading: Size guide
settings.intro: Classic unisex fit on 220gsm heavyweight cotton. True to size — size up for an easier drape. Measurements in cm, garment laid flat.

settings.heading: Care
settings.body: Wash cold, inside out. Hang dry — tumble dryers are for quitters. The distressed prints are meant to age with you; they’ll look better at year five than day one, like most things with backbone.

settings.heading: Where are the shirts printed?
settings.body: Printed in Britain on ethically sourced heavyweight cotton blanks. Built to outlast fashion — and most governments.

settings.heading: Is this a political brand?
settings.body: No. It’s a t-shirt brand with a skull in a bowler hat. Read into that what you like.

settings.heading: When do new designs drop?
settings.body: New files are declassified every few months. Join the Home Guard for first access — subscribers get 48 hours before anyone else.

settings.heading: Do you restock sold-out colours?
settings.body: Usually, but slowly — we print in small runs to keep quality up and landfill down. Sign up to be notified the moment a restock lands.

settings.heading: Can I use my BACKBONE10 code on sale items?
Contact
settings.body: Email hq@blitzspirit.co.uk — a human answers within one working day. For order queries, include your order number and we’ll sort it without a fuss.
